item.title: Loop Technology Expands Automation Solutions to North America
item.description: UK Based Loop Technology recently announced the launch of Loop Technology US Inc., marking a significant step in the company’s international expansion.

item.title: Datalogic Unveils World’s First Single-Reader Solution for 1-Metre Conveyor Scanning
item.description: Datalogic has introduced the Matrix 830 and 930 series, the only 2D area imagers in the world that can scan conveyor belts up to 1 meter wide with a single device.

item.title: Teledyne e2v’s Perciva 5D Targets Next-Generation Robotics and Smart Factory Vision Systems
item.description: Teledyne e2v launches the Perciva 5D camera, designed to make high-quality short-range 3D vision cost-effective, reliable, and easy to integrate.

item.title: Back to Hands-On CMM Metrology – Precision Without the Programming
item.description: Mitutoyo expands its coordinate metrology portfolio with the CRYSTA-KM 565 manual CMM, delivering reliable dimensional inspection with simplicity and cost efficiency.

item.title: AI Moves into the Control Loop – ABB Integrates Deep Learning Vision with Machine Automation
item.description: ABB seamlessly integrates AI-based machine vision directly into the machine control system, enabling vision data to feed advanced, real-time machine control loops.

item.title: AI-Powered Industrial Camera Platform Made for High-Speed Diagnostics
item.description: A new AI-powered industrial camera from RDI Technologies achieves high frame rates and precise displacement measurements for advanced high-speed diagnostics.

item.title: Inline Imaging-Ellipsometer Resets Speed Barrier for Thin-Film Quality Control in Roll-to-Roll Manufacturing
item.description: An inline imaging-ellipsometer utilizing an Allied Vision EXO250ZU3 polarized camera enables real-time, full-area optical thickness measurement for roll-to-roll production.
